message:
fix(agent): emit TurnEnd and message lifecycle events on stream-setup errors

When provider.stream() returned an error before any streaming began,
the agent loop skipped emitting TurnEnd (and MessageStart/MessageEnd),
causing extensions listening for lifecycle events to miss the turn
entirely.

- Add build_error_message() helper to construct a well-formed
  AssistantMessage with StopReason::Error
- In pre-stream error path: now emit MessageStart, MessageEnd,
  TurnEnd, then AgentEnd in correct order so extensions always
  see a complete lifecycle
- In mid-stream error path: refactor to use the same
  build_error_message() helper
- Add StreamSetupErrorProvider test mock and test verifying
  event ordering (stream_setup_errors_still_emit_turn_end_before_agent_end)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
